evaluation_checks.name: retrieval_correctness
evaluation_checks.description: Response must contain the expected keywords or cite the relevant FAQ entry when supported.

evaluation_checks.name: fallback_behavior
evaluation_checks.description: Unsupported questions should trigger the prescribed fallback message.

evaluation_checks.name: citation_presence
evaluation_checks.description: Responses requiring citations must include a source reference.
evaluation_checks.threshold: Citation present for all questions with requires_citation true

evaluation_checks.name: hallucination_rate
evaluation_checks.description: No unsupported claims should appear in responses; rate calculated over all cases.
